positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a celestial journey, featuring a stylized, smiling crescent moon cradling a cluster of geometric stars and orbiting planetoid rings. The overall style is elegant, modern graphic art, rendered in deep indigo blue, vibrant gold foil accents, and crisp off-white negative space. The composition is centrally balanced, creating a clean, symmetrical silhouette suitable for apparel printing. Clean lines, high contrast, dot work detailing, perfect symmetry, flat lay aesthetic. --ar 1:1 --v 6.0
negative: low detail, blurry, grainy, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, poor anatomy, multiple heads, extra limbs, realistic photo, 3d render, messy background
